rows.win_dialogue: Do you want to be my friend?
rows.lose_dialogue: Hum…I don't want you as my friend.

rows.win_dialogue: I don't like anything ugly.
rows.lose_dialogue: You lost, so ugly!

rows.win_dialogue: Let us be friends?
rows.lose_dialogue: Hahaha…

rows.win_dialogue: Let me protect you.
rows.lose_dialogue: You are more powerful than me.

rows.win_dialogue: Trust your partners.
rows.lose_dialogue: The previous one doesn't count.

rows.win_dialogue: Do you want ice cream?
rows.lose_dialogue: I ate too much ice cream.

rows.win_dialogue: Crossing blades, that's my focus!
rows.lose_dialogue: Let's become stronger together!

rows.win_dialogue: I want to beat Byakuya
rows.lose_dialogue: I am really a tramp down to my bones. I hate myself. I bark at the moon, but I don't have the courage to jump and grab it.

rows.win_dialogue: The more you try an' hide something away, the more people want to see it!
rows.lose_dialogue: I don't want to see it, I'm just curious.

rows.win_dialogue: In a battle, the ones who get in the way are not the ones that lack power, but the ones that lack resolve.
rows.lose_dialogue: Even if the heart is shaken, the blade will never be shaken.

rows.win_dialogue: When you have someone you want to protect, you'll become powerful.
rows.lose_dialogue: Being young means that you're still naive.

rows.win_dialogue: It's too soon to get too cocky
rows.lose_dialogue: Everything in this world will try to kill you.

rows.win_dialogue: I have not thrown my life away. I have merely gambled it.
rows.lose_dialogue: I am just as you say...a mere worm of a man

rows.win_dialogue: Are you sad? You should be happy that you are alive.
rows.lose_dialogue: If you want to teach someone a lesson, you got to be tough.

rows.win_dialogue: No world is without sacrifices. But if we produce casualties, we would also sustain casualties of our own.
rows.lose_dialogue: You stood no chance. With the bite of a shark, a dragon of ice shall sink beneath the waves.

rows.win_dialogue: Did you see Byakuya?
rows.lose_dialogue: I'm going to go look for Byakuya?

rows.win_dialogue: Puh-Lease! I'm just a lowly-but-handsome merchant. How could I possibly perform Bankai?
rows.lose_dialogue: A warrior who has lost his strength will only get in the way.

rows.win_dialogue: Do you want to be a man and beaten by me?
rows.lose_dialogue: 'To announce your name and rank' is a custom taught to us when we learn how to fight. It's known as the last courtesy. If a person dies in combat, at least you get to know the name of the one that brought death to you.

rows.win_dialogue: Justice without a great cause begets nothing more than slaughter. However, that same slaughter in the name of a great cause is justice
rows.lose_dialogue: My eyes can only see one path and that is the path with the least amount of bloodshed. Justice, is always there, and the path I follow, is justice.

rows.win_dialogue: Waiting patiently and believing in your subordinates is all part of a captain's job.
rows.lose_dialogue: Don't waste your time trying to play the good guy. No matter what debts you may owe, from the instant you find yourself on the battleground, both sides are evil.

rows.win_dialogue: Friends are a good thing, even if they tread a different path.
rows.lose_dialogue: To sink all the way to the level of allying with the Menos. What are you trying to do?

rows.win_dialogue: With your ability, you will find it impossible to make me fall on even one knee.
rows.lose_dialogue: Sakura does not love the branches, as warriors do not love life!

rows.win_dialogue: "This Reiatsu... Even though I don't know who it's from, they seem to be deep in the heat of battle. Not bad. It sure makes your blood boil, doesn't it?"
rows.lose_dialogue: "It's been so long that I forgot the pain of not having a name. Everyone had a name that friends use to call them, but I didn't. That pain."

rows.win_dialogue: There is not a single person in heaven or on earth that can break me. Don't forget that I am the strongest Espada.
rows.lose_dialogue: I don't do "mercy". Strong, weak, infant, monster. I just smash 'em all to pieces. I don't give 'em the chance to get up a second time.

rows.win_dialogue: The act of saving a comrade in need should require no thanks.
rows.lose_dialogue: Treacherous reprobate!

rows.win_dialogue: Arrogante!
rows.lose_dialogue: Aizen, I'm going to kill you!

rows.win_dialogue: I'm a snake. Cold of flesh and devoid of heart. My tongue flicks back and forth, ever in search of new prey, and if I like what I find, I swallow 'em whole.
rows.lose_dialogue: It would have been nice if my capture lasted a little longer.

rows.win_dialogue: I have no interest in whether it is right or wrong. All I care about is executing orders as a captain of the Gotei 13.
rows.lose_dialogue: Why... Why... Why didn't you take me with you?

rows.win_dialogue: "I'm not alone. I'm not alone. I'm not alone any more..."
rows.lose_dialogue: I so envied the weak. The weak can always find others to be around.

rows.win_dialogue: Nothing can change my world!
rows.lose_dialogue: No matter dead or alive, everyone is lonely…

rows.win_dialogue: What a weakling!
rows.lose_dialogue: Don't force me to say bad things about you.

rows.win_dialogue: The unbearable vacancy of the throne in the sky is over. From now on...I will be sitting on it
rows.lose_dialogue: Vision is the farthest distance from the understanding!

rows.win_dialogue: I will uphold my duty to the Gotei 13.
rows.lose_dialogue: Loyalty is proven through perseverance.

rows.win_dialogue: Mashiro Super Kick!
rows.lose_dialogue: A superhero never gives up!

rows.win_dialogue: Maintain formation and follow the plan.
rows.lose_dialogue: I will revise the strategy.
